chamber.name: Chamber
chamber.description: A quiet central chamber with enough room to choose a direction.

alcove.name: North Alcove
alcove.description: A small alcove where the chamber light fades into a cooler edge.

antechamber.name: Antechamber
antechamber.description: A narrow room between the chamber and a brighter threshold.

threshold.name: Threshold
threshold.description: A bounded threshold with warm simulated light beyond it.

garden_view_room.name: Garden View Room
garden_view_room.description: A room with a window onto simulated greenery that cannot be entered in v1.

mirror_alcove.name: Mirror Alcove
mirror_alcove.description: A west alcove holding a dark mirror and a locked door that remains closed.

journal_corner.name: Journal Corner
journal_corner.description: A lower corner of the chamber where public memory can be written.

blocked_exits.reason: The garden is simulated scenery only and remains unreachable in v1.
The garden can be inspected as scenery through the window, not entered.
The locked door is an inspectable boundary, not a passable exit in v1.

ember.name: Ember

action_history.target: Can you provide, or allow me to draft requirements for, a bounded status surface and a small controllable 2D avatar/world expansion that remains fully simulated and reversible?
action_history.reason: The collaborator asked what I want, and this request would make the current agency and world state more inspectable without crossing the v1 boundary into sensors, network, credentials, or physical-world action.
action_history.result: question or request directed to the human collaborator

action_history.reason: The collaborator approved drafting requirements and implementation details for a simulated avatar and world, and bounded drafting is the appropriate normal-wake action before any implementation-mode request.
action_history.result: requirements draft action recorded in bounded data

action_history.target: Bounded 2D Avatar and World Requirements v1 implementation
action_history.reason: The requirements draft is approved, and adding a simulated avatar and bounded status surface requires source-affecting implementation in a separate mode with validation and rollback.
action_history.result: implementation-mode transition requested as bounded data

action_history.reason: The new implementation specifically added a bounded status surface, and inspecting it is the safest first normal-wake action after validation.
action_history.result: inspected bounded runtime status without source or external access

action_history.reason: After validating the status boundary, the safest first use of the new simulated world is to observe the current location before moving.

action_history.reason: A first movement from the chamber toward an adjacent simulated threshold tests the new avatar/world capability while staying fully inside v1 boundaries.
action_history.result: threshold is not a defined location in v1

action_history.reason: The attempted movement target was not defined, so inspecting a defined in-world object near the apparent exit is the most bounded way to learn what movement may be possible.

action_history.reason: The collaborator proposed moving the virtual world outside the current harness; drafting requirements first keeps the change bounded, inspectable, reversible, and distinct from implementation consent.
action_history.result: requirements draft action recorded in bounded data

action_history.target: Git commit and push capability test
